ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH Treatment Expenses incurred for inpatient care treatment under Ayurveda, Yoga and Naturopathy, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy systems of medicines is covered up to 100% of Sum Insured, during each policy year as specified in the policy schedule.

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Maternity Expenses (Code – Excl18): i. Medical treatment expenses traceable to childbirth (including complicated deliveries and caesarean sections incurred during hospitalization) except ectopic pregnancy; ii. Expenses towards miscarriage

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Organ Donor Expenses We will cover Inpatient Care Medical Expenses towards the donor for the harvesting of the organ donated provided that: (a) the organ donor is any person in accordance with the Transplantation of Human Organs Act, 1994 and other applicable

restoration_benefit.source_quote: Life Protect Benefit In the event of Life Threatening Condition if the Sum Insured becomes insufficient, we will give additional amount for any claim admissible under section D.1 up to the limits specified in Product Benefits Table

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: Domiciliary Hospitalization We will cover Medical Expenses upto Sum Insured for medical treatment taken at home if this continues for an uninterrupted period of 3 days and the condition for which treatment is taken would otherwise have necessitated Hospitalization

critical_illness_cover.source_quote: Second Opinion for Critical Illness We will provide You a second opinion from Medical Practitioner, if an Insured Person is diagnosed with the Critical Illness during the Policy Period. The expert opinion would be directly sent to the Insured Person.
